title: Range over Slice
description: Iterate over a slice of strings and print each item.
problemStatement:
The `range` keyword is the easiest way to iterate. Given the slice `fruits := []string{"Apple", "Banana"}`, use `for _, f := range fruits` to print each fruit name.

**Requirement:** Use the underscore `_` to ignore the index.
hints: Go will error if you declare a variable (like the index) and don't use it.
